title: Slope
description: A fast-paced 3D running game where you control a ball rolling down a slope. Avoid obstacles and stay on the track!
The classic number puzzle game where you slide tiles to reach 2048. Simple to learn, hard to master!

title: Tetris
description: The world-famous block-stacking puzzle game. Rotate and place shapes to clear lines.

title: Cookie Clicker
description: The original idle game where you click cookies to build an empire. Buy upgrades and hire grandmas!

title: Minecraft Classic
description: Play the original version of Minecraft in your browser. Build anything you can imagine with 32 blocks.

title: Paper.io 2
description: Capture as much territory as possible in this multiplayer arena game. Don't let others hit your tail!

title: Doodle Jump
description: Jump from platform to platform, picking up jetpacks and avoiding monsters in this endless climber.

title: Crossy Road
description: Why did the chicken cross the road? Find out in this endless hopper game!
